name: F1 Racer : Formula Car Racing Game

reviews.review_description: I tried getting into the game and it would just kick me out

developer_response.body: Dear Player, We have fixed the issue. Please uninstall the current apk and install newer version. If you got any issue with the game please let us know at theuaflex@gmail.com. Thank you. Could you please give us 5 star ratings as it matters a lot to us. We are consistently working on the game to improve game performance, add more cars, improve the physics and adding more tracks.
